'''Tol''' was a barren, rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]], third in the [[Dostra system]] in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="AIR" />

{{Planet-stub}}
